name: Study Table
description:
Client is a widow currently living in a one-room rental flat with her 21-year-old daughter and her partner. Client is certified unfit for work due to both her physical and mental health conditions, and experiencing difficulties cleaning up her flat due to her deteriorating eyesight. She is usually dependent on her daughter to clean up the flat, but daughter is usually busy away from home to provide sufficient support.
The rental flat has recently been infested with bedbugs, requiring fumigation, home cleaning services and the need to throw majority of their furniture. As a result, they will require a new study table to be replaced.
Beneficiary would require help from donor to arrange for delivery and cover the delivery costs.

name: Vacuum Cleaner
description:
The household consists of two parents and six children residing in a 2-room public rental flat. Husband is the sole breadwinner, and the family experiences financial constraints in meeting their daily living expenses.

In early June 2026, client's three younger children were hospitalised due to environmental-triggered health conditions. Following medical concerns and in consideration of the children's health and hygiene needs, the family has decided to replace their old pillows and aged mattresses, which may be contributing to the environmental triggers.

Due to their limited financial means, the family is seeking assistance to obtain new pillows and mattresses for the children to provide a cleaner and healthier sleeping environment and to support their overall well-being.

His father is currently bedridden and has high care needs, and mother is the main caregiver, so parents are unable to afford to buy him a new one. The rest of his siblings are also school-going. A new bicycle will be of great benefit to him.
